name: getOpenBrowser
description: Opens a new browser tab for the user with the specified URL. Requires the Jenny browser extension. Use browserCode only when the user mentioned a Jenny browser code in the chat and normal web-login identity is not available.

url.description: The URL to open in a new browser tab. Must start with https:// or http://

browserCode.description: Optional Jenny browser code shown by the extension. Use only as a fallback when web-login user identity is unavailable.
